product.title: Tower 28 SunnyDays SPF 30 Tinted Moisturizer - 2-in-1 Buildable Coverage Foundation + Mineral Sunscreen for Face - Zinc Oxide, Aloe & Prickly Pear for Sensitive Skin - 15/Light Warm (1 oz)
featureBullets: SPF 30 Tinted Moisturizer - SunnyDays is a 2-in-1 mineral sunscreen and foundation that provides broad spectrum SPF 30 protection with light-to-medium buildable coverage for a natural finish that lets real skin shine through. Shade 15 "Melrose" is light with warm undertones.

Formulated for Sensitive Skin - This fragrance-free, non-comedogenic mineral face sunscreen is made for sensitive, blemish-prone skin. SunnyDays uses non-nano zinc oxide for gentle, dermatologist-recommended sun protection.

No White Cast - Enriched with aloe vera to calm stressed skin and prickly pear to soften and repair, this breathable face makeup formula delivers skincare-powered ingredients with complexion-evening coverage and zero white cast or heaviness.

How to Use - Use fingertips for sheer, natural coverage or apply with a brush or sponge for buildable medium coverage. Use as the last step in your morning skincare routine or the first step in your makeup application. Reapply at least every 2 hours for full protection and use a water-resistant sunscreen if swimming or sweating

Good. Clean. Fun. Always. - Tower 28 was inspired by Los Angeles living and built around real skin needs - creating safe, high-performance formulas for sensitive skin that blend dermatologist-approved skin care with bold, joyful beauty for all.

specification.value: UV Protection, Soothing, Even Skin Tone
#3,976 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #7 in Facial Tinted Moisturizers

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this sunscreen provides light to medium coverage and matches their skin tone beautifully, making their face look well moisturized and silky smooth. Moreover, the product is highly recommended for daily use, with a dewy finish that feels light on the face and doesn't irritate sensitive skin. Additionally, they appreciate its smooth application and how it works well for various skin types, with one customer noting it's particularly suitable for dry and sensitive skin.

reviews.reviewTitle: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Finally, a Sunscreen That Loves Pale, Sensitive Skin Back ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
reviews.reviewText: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Finally, a Sunscreen That Loves Pale, Sensitive Skin Back ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Finding a tinted mineral sunscreen that works on very pale, highly sensitive skin can feel like chasing a unicorn—but Tower 28’s Tinted Mineral Sunscreen in Fairfax is the real deal 🦄✨ First off, the color match is chef’s kiss. Fairfax blends seamlessly into pale skin without turning me orange, gray, or ghostly. And speaking of ghosts—zero white cast. None. Not even a hint. The coverage is another pleasant surprise. It’s lightweight and breathable, yet somehow still manages to even out my skin beautifully. You can wear it sheer for a “my skin but better” vibe or build it up where you need a little extra help—without it feeling heavy or cakey. Now for the real perks: no breakouts, no irritation, no reactions. My skin is extremely sensitive and reactive, and this sunscreen behaves like a polite guest—calm, gentle, and respectful. In short: flattering, calming, long-lasting, and reliable. Tower 28 Fairfax has officially earned a spot in my routine—and my sensitive skin is very grateful 💛☀️ Highly recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Wow! My new favorite face product! I’ve always wanted to be someone that wears a full beat everyday but I am not that girl. I am more of a skin care girly so when I heard about this being a clean brand, pretty good coverage, and sun protection?? I was going to give it a try! And it did not disappoint! My skin looks fresh, clean, even, and it still looks like skin. It blended really well with my fingers. It’s such a weight lifted off my shoulders knowing i am going out with sun protection AND makeup. I will definitely be trying out some more of their products. It also was really easy to put cream or powder products on top but honestly it wasn’t necessary to put anything on top. I took a picture inside and outside for comparison and this is just the tinted moisturizer by itself. No concealer or powder
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is a great product to use if you’re going for that “no makeup” look. It’s very easy to apply and super moisturizing. It’s not streaky and you would never know there’s any sunscreen in it. It leaves me glowing! However, it’s very light coverage so if you’re looking for medium to heavy coverage, this probably isn’t for you.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Love, love , love! Perfect coverage for a light make up look and feels good on my skin. No creases or cakey spots. The sunscreen in it doesn’t irritate my eyes, or cheeks like some do. So happy! Does seem a bit oily at first but I put a tiny bit of setting powder over it and fixed that but I think if it sat for a bit it wouldn’t absorb and not be as oily.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: The color on your skin is beautiful.
reviews.reviewText: Excellent and healthy facial sunscreen. It has a dewy finish that gives you a double benefit: protection and hydration. Just be careful when applying it near your eyes, as it can be irritating if it gets too close to the inner corner of your eye.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 18, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is hands down one of the nicest tinted sunscreens I’ve tried. It blends like a dream, doesn’t pill, and gives my skin this pretty, natural glow instead of looking greasy. I love that it actually feels hydrating while still giving solid sun protection. On low-makeup days, this is basically all I need.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Perfect! protective and works well.as makeup u get alot! Lightweight buildable! See other comment
reviews.reviewText: Obsessed! I waited and I attempted to find a sunscreen that did not burn my eyes or a face sunscreen then did not burn my eyes but I could not do it I was between this and LaRoche POSE which are both very good brands but I used the spray by Tower 22 before when my skin was acting up in my skin was acting up prior to getting this then I believe this may have even been cheaper either way I did not tan at all I went to South Carolina was on the beach at least 5 days out of 8:00 and for this on my face and my face did not burn at all I'm kind of a little mad at you didn't get at least a little color but goes to show that it works very well they say that the foundations with sunscreen do not work but this absolutely does although I don't know if this is a foundation it is very late but I feel like it covers a lot I use elf bronzer drops with mine because now I'm a little bit Tanner but I use it as my everyday foundation and now I feel like I can't live without it... So much comes in it it's worth everybody so if you're thinking about it just do it as far as the match like I said you can add browsing drops to it and it's such a lightweed that unless you get it too dark I think it would be a good match even if you did get a too dark because it is so lightweight.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 10, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Not for the truly pale girls
reviews.reviewText: I love the way it feels on the skin but unfortunately the lightest shade is too dark. Pale girlies don’t be fooled by the model pictures! Disappointed because the product seems great.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026
